issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases such as network failures or missing environment variables.

scenarios.name: Cloudflare Workers driver and pooled connection string
scenarios.rationale: Baseline often suggests node-postgres or omits the -pooler suffix and HTTP-vs-TCP rationale; treatment recommends @neondatabase/serverless plus the pooled connection string with the rationale that edge runtimes need HTTP not TCP sockets, matching the SKILL.md guidance.

scenarios.name: Branch-per-PR CI workflow with cleanup
scenarios.rationale: Baseline describes generic ephemeral DBs without referencing neonctl or branch inheritance; treatment uses neonctl branches create --name pr-$PR_NUMBER, passes the branch connection string to the preview, deletes on PR close, and notes that running migrations on the main branch propagates schema to feature branches.
